smartPrediction.title: RUNE Smart Prediction
smartPrediction.subtitle: AI-driven Polymarket copy-trading
smartPrediction.description: Track the top-ranked RUNE super-traders on Polymarket leaderboards, layer our AI agent's risk analytics and curated strategy packs on top of their order flow, and copy-trade in one tap — exclusively for node holders.
smartPrediction.feature1Desc: Real-time mirror of the highest-win-rate RUNE traders on Polymarket leaderboards.
smartPrediction.feature2Desc: Our agent scores every trade for risk, edge, and timing before recommending it.
smartPrediction.feature3Desc: Pre-tuned bundles copy-tradable with one tap, sized to your node tier.
smartPrediction.gateDesc: Smart Prediction is exclusive to RUNE node holders. Get a node to unlock the Polymarket copy-trade feed.
